FADE IN:

EXT. HIGHWAY - NIGHT

A single pair of headlights cuts through the dark.

                                        SMASH CUT TO:

INT. DINER - CONTINUOUS

The waitress drops a plate.

                                        CUT TO:

INT. BEDROOM - DAY

Morning light spills across empty sheets.

                                        DISSOLVE TO:

INT. BEDROOM - NIGHT

The same bed, but occupied. Two people sleeping.

                                        MATCH CUT TO:

EXT. CEMETERY - DAY

A grave. Fresh flowers.

                                        CUT TO BLACK.

                                        FADE OUT.

THE END.
